purpose: A curated registry of the most popular public skill repositories, used to fetch a specific skill on demand as a learning reference for structure and content organization.
stars_note: stargazers_count, default_branch, and license were verified via `gh api repos/<owner>/<name>` and captured 2026-06; refresh the same way. license 'see-repo' means GitHub did not detect a single SPDX license.
learning_note: Learn how these skills organize content, triggers, and assets — do NOT copy. An industrial skill must also cover control boundaries, test assets, quantitative metrics, lifecycle, and an evidence base (see docs/research/skill_reference_library.md).

repos.name: skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: Anthropic 官方 SKILL.md 的 frontmatter 结构、触发描述写法，以及 scripts/references/agents 子目录如何组成自包含技能包。
repos.what_to_learn_en: The canonical SKILL.md frontmatter schema, trigger phrasing for self-selection, and how scripts/references/agents subdirectories co-package a self-contained skill.
repos.caveat: License not SPDX-detected; document skills (docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx) are source-available, not Apache-2.0.

repos.name: claude-plugins-official
repos.what_to_learn_zh: SKILL.md 如何嵌入更大的 plugin 包结构（.claude-plugin 元数据、commands/、agents/），以及官方质量与安全门的组织方式。
repos.what_to_learn_en: How SKILL.md skills embed inside a broader plugin package (.claude-plugin metadata, commands/, agents/) and how curated quality/security gates are organized.
repos.caveat: Plugin-level packaging; exact skill paths vary by plugin.

repos.name: agent-skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何按开发生命周期阶段（定义/计划/构建/验证/审查/发布）分类技能，以及每个 SKILL.md 如何内嵌验证关卡和反合理化表格。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Categorizing skills by development-lifecycle phase, and how each SKILL.md encodes verification gates and anti-rationalization tables for reliability.
repos.caveat: Indicative paths; verify against the live tree.

repos.name: antigravity-awesome-skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 大规模技能库如何设计机器可读的 skills_index.json 清单和 CATALOG.md 注册表，以及如何通过 npm CLI 跨平台分发。
repos.what_to_learn_en: How a large-scale library designs a machine-readable skills_index.json manifest and CATALOG.md registry, and distributes via an npm CLI across platforms.
repos.caveat: 1,494+ entries; individual skill quality varies widely.

repos.name: awesome-copilot
repos.what_to_learn_zh: GitHub Copilot 生态对 SKILL.md 的适配，以及技能与 instructions（文件模式触发）、hooks、plugins 的关系。
repos.what_to_learn_en: How GitHub Copilot adapts SKILL.md and how skills relate to instructions (file-pattern triggers), hooks, and plugin bundles.
repos.caveat: Exact SKILL.md paths under /skills are not all enumerated publicly.

repos.name: agent-skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何把框架最佳实践（React/Next.js）编码为 SKILL.md，并维护平行的 AGENTS.md 跨平台兼容文件。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Encoding framework best-practices (React/Next.js) into SKILL.md alongside a parallel AGENTS.md for cross-agent compatibility.

repos.name: skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 技能生态的包管理器如何定义发现路径规则（.claude/skills/ 等），以及 flat layout 与 catalog layout 的组织约定。
repos.what_to_learn_en: How the skills package manager defines discovery path rules and flat-layout vs catalog-layout conventions for SKILL.md.
repos.caveat: Tooling/package-manager repo rather than skill content; license not SPDX-detected.

repos.name: Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何用 SKILL.md 封装高抽象度知识（上下文压缩、多 agent 编排），以及基础与高级技能的粒度划分。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Encapsulating high-abstraction knowledge (context compression, multi-agent orchestration) into SKILL.md, and beginner-vs-advanced granularity.

repos.name: claude-skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何按企业职能域横向拆分技能，以及每个技能包配套参考文档和自动化脚本的标准化附属结构。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Partitioning skills by enterprise function domain and standardizing each skill with co-located reference guides plus automation scripts.
repos.caveat: Cross-platform compatibility claims not independently verified.

repos.name: skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何把个人/团队技术偏好和生态最佳实践编码为 SKILL.md，并用 references/ 子目录卸载细节保持简洁。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Encoding personal/team tech preferences into SKILL.md and using a references/ subdir to keep the skill file concise.

repos.name: skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何用 plugin 目录结构按语言维度复用同一服务技能，以及语言无关基础技能放在 .github/skills/ 的组织方式。
repos.what_to_learn_en: How a plugin directory replicates a service skill per language and places language-agnostic foundation skills under a shared .github/skills/.
repos.caveat: Azure-specific, tightly coupled to Microsoft SDKs.

repos.name: awesome-agent-skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何对来自不同组织的技能按平台/领域建立可浏览索引，用作发现高质量第三方范例的目录。
repos.what_to_learn_en: How to index skills from diverse organizations into a browsable directory; a discovery mechanism for high-quality third-party examples.
repos.caveat: Curated index — no SKILL.md files hosted in the repo itself.

repos.name: awesome-claude-skills
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 用作发现资源：快速定位官方技能名称和高质量社区仓库，作为技能搜索的起点。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Use as a discovery index to locate official skill names and high-quality community repos as a starting point.
repos.caveat: Curated awesome-list; no SKILL.md files hosted; license not SPDX-detected.

repos.name: context-engineering-kit
repos.what_to_learn_zh: 如何设计最小 token 占用的技能（明确反对膨胀），以及把 Reflexion、Kaizen 等元认知模式封装为可复用结构。
repos.what_to_learn_en: Designing minimum-token-footprint skills (explicitly anti-bloat) and packaging meta-cognitive patterns like Reflexion and Kaizen as reusable structures.
repos.caveat: GPL-3.0 (more restrictive than most); default branch is master, not main.
